title: Observability & Debugging
description: Add comprehensive observability and debugging features including structured logging, performance profiling, network tracing, and diagnostic tools to help users understand what Jarvy is doing, diagnose failures, and optimize performance
completionNote: Observability shipped at src/observability/ (logging.rs, sanitizer.rs, telemetry_gate.rs, network_trace.rs, profiler.rs, bundle.rs). Tracing-subscriber + OTLP wiring in src/telemetry.rs. Ticket/debug bundle at src/ticket/.
acceptance_criteria: Profile shows phase breakdown (parse, detect, download, install, hooks)
Per-tool timing displayed with visual bars
--trace-network shows all HTTP requests with timing
Network trace includes DNS, connect, TLS, transfer breakdown
Diagnose checks binary, dependencies, config, connectivity
jarvy doctor --extended shows full health dashboard
Dashboard includes system overview, PM status, performance metrics
jarvy diagnose --export creates sanitized diagnostic bundle
Sensitive data (tokens, passwords, emails) automatically redacted

tasks.title: Create observability module structure
tasks.description: Set up src/observability/ module with core files and exports
subtasks: Add feature flags for optional components

tasks.title: Implement structured logging
tasks.description: Set up tracing-based logging with multiple output formats
subtasks: Implement LogLevel enum (Quiet, Normal, Verbose, Debug, Trace)

tasks.title: Implement performance profiler
tasks.description: Track timing of all operations with phase breakdown
subtasks: Create Profiler struct with phase tracking
Generate ASCII bar charts for visualization
Create ProfileReport struct for JSON export

tasks.title: Add profiling CLI integration
subtasks: Display profile summary at end of operations
Wire profiler into tool installation pipeline

tasks.title: Implement network tracing
tasks.description: Track all HTTP requests with detailed timing
subtasks: Create NetworkTiming struct (DNS, connect, TLS, transfer)
tasks.note: network_trace module deleted in observability cleanup — no CLI surface or callers after 2 release cycles

tasks.title: Add network tracing CLI
tasks.description: Add --trace-network flag and network analysis command
subtasks: Display real-time request logging when enabled
tasks.note: network_trace module deleted in observability cleanup — no CLI surface or callers after 2 release cycles

tasks.title: Implement data sanitizer
tasks.description: Redact sensitive data from logs and exports
subtasks: Define sensitive data patterns (API keys, tokens, passwords)
Create Sanitizer struct with regex patterns

tasks.title: Create diagnose command
tasks.description: Implement jarvy diagnose <tool> for deep tool diagnosis
subtasks: Create diagnose subcommand with tool argument

tasks.title: Add diagnose --fix option
tasks.description: Implement automated remediation for common issues
subtasks: Add confirmation prompts before applying fixes
Handle shell config file modifications safely

tasks.title: Enhance doctor dashboard
tasks.description: Add --extended flag for comprehensive health dashboard
subtasks: Add system overview (OS, shell, uptime, load, memory, disk)
Show package manager status with package counts

tasks.title: Add metrics collection
tasks.description: Track and persist performance metrics over time

tasks.title: Implement diagnostic bundle export
tasks.description: Create jarvy diagnose --export for support bundles
subtasks: Create ZIP archive with zip crate
tasks.note: shipped as src/ticket/ ZIP bundler (jarvy ticket create) + diagnose --export; separate DiagnosticBundle module deleted as duplicate

tasks.title: Add doctor category filtering
tasks.description: Allow checking specific categories with --check flag
tasks.note: jarvy doctor --check <path,tools,hooks> — filters checkable sections (system info always shown as context); unknown category exits 2; composes with --tools/--extended. Merged 2026-07-08. Note: PRD sketch listed network/performance categories, but network_trace was deleted and profiling lives on setup --profile, so N/A.

tasks.title: Write integration tests
subtasks: Test jarvy diagnose <tool> for known tool
tasks.note: tests/observability_cli.rs: 10 integration tests (doctor --check filtering + error, --format json, --extended, setup --profile stderr report, --profile-output *_ms JSON, --log-format json, diagnose <tool>, diagnose --export writes JSON). Plus doctor category-parser unit tests. Note: diagnose --export writes JSON (not a ZIP; the ZIP debug bundle is jarvy ticket).

implementation_notes.tracing_integration: Use existing tracing crate, add tracing-subscriber for formatting
implementation_notes.profiler_design: Thread-local profiler instance, aggregate at end of operation
implementation_notes.network_middleware: Use tower-http or reqwest middleware for HTTP tracing
implementation_notes.sanitizer_patterns: Compile regex patterns once at startup for performance
implementation_notes.bundle_format: Standard ZIP with JSON files, text logs, no binaries
implementation_notes.metrics_storage: Simple JSON file, not a database - keep it lightweight
implementation_notes.overhead_budget: Debug mode < 10% overhead, profile mode < 5% overhead

risks.description: Log volume explosion in debug mode
risks.mitigation: Level filtering, log rotation, configurable limits
Optional feature, minimal instrumentation when disabled
Comprehensive sanitization, review prompts before sharing

risks.description: Disk space from logs and metrics
risks.mitigation: Rotation policies, size limits, cleanup commands
Clear formatting, summaries first, progressive disclosure

reconciled: 2026-07-08: ALL PRD-027 tasks closed. T14 (doctor --check) + T16 (observability integration tests) merged; T6/T7 network tracing = wont_do (module deleted); flag-wiring/profiler/bundle-deletion done earlier. PRD complete.
